description_long: This object is a cylindrical can with a metallic top and bottom, featuring a pull-tab opening mechanism. The body of the can is predominantly white with a decorative yellow band near the top and bottom edges. Bold red stylized text reading 'CUP NOODLE' dominates the front, accompanied by Japanese characters above and below the main logo. The can's surface is smooth and glossy, with printed graphics and text clearly visible. The top of the can is slightly recessed, and the pull-tab is centrally located, indicating it is designed to be opened by hand. The overall appearance suggests it is a packaged snack, likely containing instant noodles.
description: A white cylindrical can with a metallic pull-tab lid, decorated with bold red 'CUP NOODLE' branding and yellow accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full 'CUP NOODLE' logo, Japanese text, and yellow banding.
description_view_1: Side view with partial logo visible and mostly plain white surface with yellow band.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, with clear branding and text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the edge of the logo and mostly plain white surface.
attribute_brand_logo: The front of the can features a large, bold red 'CUP NOODLE' logo with stylized lettering, accompanied by Japanese text above and below. The logo is centrally located and dominates the front face.
